description_long: This hammer features a robust, metallic head with a rectangular striking face and reinforced side plates, giving it a heavy-duty appearance suitable for demanding urban tasks. The head is finished in a dark, slightly reflective metal with visible bolts or rivets at the corners, suggesting enhanced durability. The handle is straight and appears to be made of a dark, possibly composite or metal material, with a slightly bulbous end for improved grip and a metal ring at the base, possibly for hanging or attaching a lanyard. The overall design is industrial, with a utilitarian aesthetic and no visible decorative elements. The hammer's surfaces show a mix of matte and glossy finishes, with some areas appearing slightly worn or scuffed. Its proportions and construction indicate it is intended for heavy striking tasks, such as demolition or construction work in urban environments.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a reinforced, rectangular metal head and a straight, dark handle featuring a metal ring at the base. The design is industrial and utilitarian, with visible bolts and a mix of matte and glossy finishes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, rectangular striking face of the hammer head, with visible bolts at the corners and the straight handle extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the hammer head, the reinforced side plates, and the rounded top, highlighting the robust construction.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the back plate of the hammer head and the handle, with less detail on the striking face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again displays the hammer head's thickness and side reinforcements, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight composite handle with a slightly bulbous end and a metal ring at the base, designed for a secure grip.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with reinforced side plates and a flat striking face, suitable for heavy-duty tasks.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: metal ring at the base of the handle
